backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and email subscription features with role-based access control (admin/user) enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three confirmed features: replacing CETA and HOPE logos with new PNG assets in Navigation, HeroSection, and Footer components, and saving those assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing the purpose and key content of each component, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the app via /src/main.tsx into a root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in LanguageProvider and renders all page sections in sequence: Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, VisionPillarsSection, ReunionSection, SurveySection, StakeholderVoicesSection, DigitalImpactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component rendering a timeline of four organizational milestones (2010–2026) with icons and a chairman profile card, with scroll-triggered entrance animations and a leaf motif background.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section showcasing four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) as animated icon cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with a CTA banner, action buttons, dual updated logos (CETA-3.png and HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png), contact info, social media links, a newsletter subscription form wired to the backend, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated countdown timer, count-up stat cards (years, alumni, batches, rating), logo row, headline, and a CTA button that scrolls to the survey section.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Decorative background component that renders up to 5 absolutely-positioned rotated diamond/leaf shapes with configurable color, opacity, and count.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language toggle button, dual logos (CETA and HOPE), and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section detailing the first HOPE Alumni Reunion event (April 12, 2026, KILA Thrissur), including a poster image, event details card, purpose icons grid, and participant category cards.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Section displaying six insight cards from February 2026 stakeholder meetings, each with an icon, title, and description, plus meeting badge labels at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Survey call-to-action section with links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys, a confidentiality badge, and a branded CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 visual card.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: React component that renders a 4-pillar strategic framework section for Vision 2036, with animated cards using intersection observer, each pillar having an icon, title, and bullet items driven by i18n keys.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Defines a React context providing English and Malayalam translations via a `t()` lookup function, along with a `toggleLanguage` function to switch between the two languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that computes and updates a countdown timer every second toward a fixed target date of April 12, 2026 at 9:00 AM IST, returning days, hours, minutes, seconds, and an expiry flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a numeric count from 0 to a target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve, triggered by a boolean flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a `isVisible` flag once a referenced element enters the viewport, disconnecting the observer afterward.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitSubscription` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitSubscription` method with an email address using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the CGCT design system with CSS custom properties for brand colors (maroon, gold, sage), Tailwind base/utilities, typography, and reusable utility classes for animations, gradients, and card effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), typography fonts, animations, and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the CETA & HOPE website, tracking versioned draft builds, completed logo-replacement features for Navigation, HeroSection, and Footer components, and asset storage paths.
